titles.title: I Will Call upon the Lord

authors.author: Aus der Bibel
Michael O´Shields
Ich will rufen zu dem Herrn

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v4 v5 v6 v6 v7 v6 v6 v7 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will call upon the Lord For he is worthy to be praised I will call upon the Lord For he is worthy to be praised I will call upon the Lord For he is worthy to be praised I will call upon the Lord For he is worthy to be praised

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So shall I be saved from my enemies

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Lord liveth and blessed be the Rock And let the God of my salvation be exalted The Lord liveth and blessed be the Rock And let the God of my salvation be exalted

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Lord liveth and blessed be the Rock And let the God of my salvation be exalted The Lord liveth and blessed be the Rock And let the God of my salvation be exalted The Lord liveth and blessed be the Rock And let the God of my salvation be exalted The Lord liveth and blessed be the Rock And let the God of my salvation be exalted

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's only one God There's only one God There's only one God There's only one God

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He's the Lord over my life Lord over my life Lord over my life Lord over my life

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There's only one There's only one There's only one There's only one
